package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for multiple_shouldbind_calls_same_handler: Gin handlers that bind the request body multiple times in one function.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule328NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule328NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule328NegativeRecord) (Rule328NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario328Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule328NegativeService, input Rule328NegativeRecord) (Rule328NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule328NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
